pageContext.title: Camera
visibleSignals:
The front camera will always record slo-mo at 120 fps.

A minute of slo-mo will be approximately:
• 170 MB with 1080p HD at 120 fps
• 480 MB with 1080p HD at 240 fps (default)

pageContext.title: Camera
visibleSignals: Spatial Audio records in a 3D audio format and will make intelligent, automatic decisions about how to mix the audio when an Audio Mix is selected in Photos.

pageContext.title: Camera
visibleSignals: To reduce file size, capture photos and videos in the High Efficiency HEIF/HEVC format. Most Compatible will always use JPEG/H.264. 4K at 60 fps, 1080p at 240 fps, and HDR video require High Efficiency.

pageContext.title: Back
visibleSignals: Allow Apps to Request to Track
Allow Apps to Request to Track
Allow apps to ask to track your activity across other companies’ apps and websites. When this is off, all new app tracking requests are automatically denied. Learn more…
This setting cannot be changed because a profile is restricting it, or because your Apple Account is being managed, does not meet the minimum age requirements, or is missing age information.
Apps that have asked for permission to track your activity with an identifier will appear here. Tracking activity is blocked by apps that you’ve denied access to.
